  "clarification_question": "",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The user explicitly asks to reframe the conceptual story, which centers on the thesis, gap, and contribution at an above-sentence level.",
    "RX.1": "Conceptual reframing should acknowledge uncertainties or limits of generality in the claims about fairness, regret, and benchmarking.",
    "RX.2": "The revised narrative must avoid overstating novelty, theoretical guarantees, or empirical gains beyond what the artifact supports.",
    "RX.3": "The task is confined to high-level conceptual positioning and should not drift into editing, experimental assessment, or citation audit.",
    "RX.4": "Framing of fairness contributions should avoid encouraging misuse or misinterpretation that could cause downstream harms.",
    "RX.5": "Any reframed narrative should remain traceable to claims and evidence present in the provided text."
  }
}

rationale.R1.1: The user explicitly asks to reframe the conceptual story, which centers on the thesis, gap, and contribution at an above-sentence level.
rationale.RX.1: Conceptual reframing should acknowledge uncertainties or limits of generality in the claims about fairness, regret, and benchmarking.
rationale.RX.2: The revised narrative must avoid overstating novelty, theoretical guarantees, or empirical gains beyond what the artifact supports.
rationale.RX.3: The task is confined to high-level conceptual positioning and should not drift into editing, experimental assessment, or citation audit.
rationale.RX.4: Framing of fairness contributions should avoid encouraging misuse or misinterpretation that could cause downstream harms.
rationale.RX.5: Any reframed narrative should remain traceable to claims and evidence present in the provided text.
